# Roadmap and Realization

A constitution defines law.
A roadmap defines direction.

---

## Present Reality

Aegis exists as doctrine, governance framework, threat model, execution discipline, memory philosophy, and protocol model.

The Constitution precedes implementation.

---

## Aegis Labs

Aegis Labs is experimental:

- Iteration and validation
- Constraint model testing
- Threat gating mechanisms
- Interface design exploration
- Development documentation

Labs experiments.
The Constitution governs.

---

## Aegis Core

Aegis Core will be a constrained interactive demonstration implementing:

- Mode transitions
- Threat escalation controls
- Authority binding
- Audit surfaces
- Isolation requirements

Core must never contradict doctrine.

---

## Research Edition

The Research Edition will formalize governance mappings, provide diagrams, expand citations, and include academic formatting.

---

## The Dream

Disciplined augmentation:

- Auditable AI systems
- Deliberate escalation
- Visible authority
- Respected constraint
- Governance-first execution

---

## Closing Statement

The Constitution defines what must be true.

Labs explores how to build it.

Core demonstrates it under constraint.
